ground_truth.title: 3 Best New York Moving Companies 2025 | ConsumerAffairs®
ground_truth.author: Cassidy McCants
ground_truth.main_content: Best Moving Companies in New York 2025. Our top 3 picks for moving companies in New York: Customer service - AmeriSafe Moving Services, Flat-rate pricing - FlatRate Moving, Punctuality and speed - Bronze Star Moving & Storage. We analyzed top movers in New York based on ratings, reviews, price, additional services, discounts, availability and several other factors so you can find the right company for your move. AmeriSafe Moving Services has a customer rating of 4.1 stars based on 905 reviews. FlatRate Moving has a customer rating of 4.2 stars based on 170 reviews. Bronze Star Moving and Storage Inc. has a customer rating of 4.1 stars based on 133 reviews. This article was reviewed by our research team at the time of publishing for accuracy of information and statistics using reliable, primary sources. We compared 27 companies and chose the top movers.
